feed.title: Google Cloud: Cloud Translation
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Cloud Translation

entry.content: Translation LLM now supports full finetuning with LoRA.
entry.summary: The translation LLM now offers full finetuning capabilities using LoRA. This allows for more efficient and customizable model training. Learn more about implementing supervised tuning with LoRA.
entry.title: Change: LLM translation model supports LoRA finetuning
